name: Massimo Group
summary: PART I . Overview Massimo Group is a U.S.-based provider of utility-focused powersports and recreational vehicles, serving rural, agricultural, and commercial customers through a nationwide distribution and service network that enables broad market coverage, efficient product delivery, and ongoing dealer and customer support.
